response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack/web engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, strong C for UNIX development, Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded networking/security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch chips). The resume shows none of the Japanese language requirement and only minimal C exposure (brief LabWindows/CVI stint a decade ago), with no embedded firmware, kernel hacking, or network-security background.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering across multiple languages and domains
Solid Linux familiarity and DevOps/CI experience
Strong testing discipline (TDD, workshops, custom test frameworks)
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
Minimal recent C / UNIX systems programming; no Linux kernel modification experience
No embedded firmware, switch/networking, or security-protocol (MACsec, 802.1X) background

key_factors.factor: Limited C and Linux kernel work
